title: OpenAPI
description: Root object of an OpenAPI 3.0 document.

__schema0.title: openapi
__schema0.description: OpenAPI version. Must be '3.0.x' for OpenAPI 3.0 documents.

__schema3.title: version
__schema3.description: The version of the API document (not the OpenAPI spec version).

__schema4.title: summary
__schema4.description: A short summary of the API.

__schema5.title: description
examples: A sample API for managing pets
This API handles user authentication and profile management
__schema5.description: A description of the API. CommonMark syntax MAY be used for rich text.

__schema6.title: termsOfService
__schema6.description: A URL to the Terms of Service for the API.

__schema7.title: Contact
__schema7.description: Contact information for the exposed API.

__schema8.title: name
__schema8.description: The identifying name of the contact person/organization.

__schema9.title: url
__schema9.description: The URL pointing to the contact information. Must be a valid URL.

__schema10.title: email
__schema10.description: The email address of the contact person/organization.

name.title: License Name
name.description: The license name used for the API.

allOf.title: License
allOf.description: License information for the exposed API.

url.title: License URL
url.description: A URL to the license used for the API.

identifier.title: License Identifier
identifier.description: An SPDX license expression for the API.

__schema19.title: url
__schema19.description: A URL to the target host. Supports server variables in {braces}. May be relative.

__schema20.title: description
__schema20.description: An optional description of the server.

__schema21.title: variables
__schema21.description: A map of server variables for URL template substitution.

__schema23.title: ServerVariable
__schema23.description: A server variable for URL template substitution. Use {variableName} in the server URL.

__schema24.title: enum
__schema24.description: An enumeration of valid string values for this variable.

__schema26.title: default
__schema26.description: The default value for substitution if not supplied.

__schema27.title: description
__schema27.description: An optional description for the server variable.

__schema30.title: paths
__schema30.description: Available paths and operations for the API.

__schema32.title: PathItem
__schema32.description: Describes the operations available on a single path.

__schema34.title: Reference
__schema34.description: A reference to another component in the specification.

__schema43.title: Operation
__schema43.description: Describes a single API operation on a path.

__schema44.title: tags
__schema44.description: A list of tags for API documentation grouping.

__schema46.title: summary
__schema46.description: A short summary of the operation. Keep under ~120 characters.

__schema47.title: description
__schema47.description: A verbose description. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema48.title: operationId
__schema48.description: Unique identifier for the operation. Used for code generation.

__schema49.title: parameters
__schema49.description: Parameters for this operation, combined with path-level parameters.

__schema51.title: Reference Object
__schema51.description: A reference to another component in the specification.

examples.description: A user is a type of person.
A pet is a type of animal.
A pet is a type of animal.

__schema52.title: summary
__schema52.description: A short summary which by default SHOULD override that of the referenced component.

__schema53.title: description
__schema53.description: A description which by default SHOULD override that of the referenced component.

__schema56.title: name
__schema56.description: The name of the query parameter. Case-sensitive.

__schema58.title: description
__schema58.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema63.description: Allows empty values (?param=). Deprecated in favor of schema-level validation.
__schema63.title: allowEmptyValue

__schema66.title: explode
__schema66.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema67.description: When true, allows reserved characters without percent-encoding.
__schema67.title: allowReserved

__schema70.title: Schema Object
__schema70.description: A Schema Object defines the shape of a JSON value.

__schema71.title: String Object
__schema71.description: A String Object defines the shape of a string value.

__schema72.title: title
__schema72.description: A title for the schema, used for documentation.

__schema73.title: description
__schema73.description: A description of the schema. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema74.title: default
__schema74.description: The default value for this schema.

__schema75.title: example
__schema75.description: An example value for this schema.

__schema76.title: enum
__schema76.description: An array of valid values for this schema.

__schema79.title: Discriminator
__schema79.description: When request bodies or response payloads may be one of a number of different schemas, a discriminator object can be used to aid in serialization, deserialization, and validation.

__schema80.title: propertyName
__schema80.description: The name of the property in the payload that will hold the discriminator value.

__schema81.title: mapping
__schema81.description: An object to hold mappings between payload values and schema names or references.

__schema86.title: XML
__schema86.description: A metadata object that allows for more fine-tuned XML model definitions.

__schema87.title: name
__schema87.description: Replaces the name of the element/attribute used for the described schema property.

__schema88.title: namespace
__schema88.description: The URI of the namespace definition.

__schema89.title: prefix
__schema89.description: The prefix to be used for the name.

__schema90.description: Declares whether the property definition translates to an attribute instead of an element.
__schema90.title: attribute

__schema92.description: May be used only for an array definition. Signifies whether the array is wrapped or not.
__schema92.title: wrapped

__schema96.title: ExternalDocumentation
__schema96.description: Allows referencing an external resource for extended documentation.

__schema97.title: description
__schema97.description: A short description of the target documentation.

__schema98.title: url
__schema98.description: The URL for the target documentation.

__schema100.title: readOnly
__schema100.description: When true, the property is only returned in responses, not accepted in requests.

__schema101.title: writeOnly
__schema101.description: When true, the property is only accepted in requests, not returned in responses.

__schema102.title: deprecated
__schema102.description: When true, indicates this schema is deprecated and should be avoided.

__schema103.title: nullable
__schema103.description: OpenAPI 3.0: Set to true to allow null values.

__schema105.title: format
__schema105.description: Semantic format hint for string values. Common formats: date-time, email, uuid, uri, hostname, ipv4, byte, binary.

__schema106.title: Pattern
__schema106.description: A regular expression pattern the string must match.

__schema112.title: Number Object
__schema112.description: A Number Object defines the shape of a number value.

__schema114.title: format
__schema114.description: Number precision format. Use 'float' for 32-bit single-precision or 'double' (default) for 64-bit double-precision IEEE 754.

__schema115.title: multipleOf
__schema115.description: Require the number to be a multiple of this value.

__schema117.title: minimum
__schema117.description: Inclusive lower bound for the number.

__schema119.title: maximum
__schema119.description: Inclusive upper bound for the number.

__schema121.title: exclusiveMinimum
__schema121.description: When true, the minimum value is exclusive (value must be > minimum).

__schema123.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema123.description: When true, the maximum value is exclusive (value must be < maximum).

__schema125.title: Integer Object
__schema125.description: An Integer Object defines the shape of an integer value.

__schema127.title: format
__schema127.description: Integer size format. Use 'int32' for signed 32-bit (-2B to 2B) or 'int64' for signed 64-bit integers.

__schema128.title: multipleOf
__schema128.description: Require the integer to be a multiple of this value.

__schema130.title: minimum
__schema130.description: Inclusive lower bound for the integer.

__schema132.title: maximum
__schema132.description: Inclusive upper bound for the integer.

__schema134.title: exclusiveMinimum
__schema134.description: When true, the minimum value is exclusive (value must be > minimum).

__schema136.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema136.description: When true, the maximum value is exclusive (value must be < maximum).

__schema138.title: Boolean Object
__schema138.description: A Boolean Object defines the shape of a boolean value.

__schema140.title: Array Object
__schema140.description: An Array Object defines the shape of an array value.

__schema150.title: Object Object
__schema150.description: An Object Object defines the shape of an object value.

__schema162.title: Composition Schema
__schema162.description: A schema using composition keywords (allOf, anyOf, oneOf, not) without a type constraint.

__schema163.title: allOf
__schema163.description: Require the instance to validate against all subschemas.

__schema165.title: anyOf
__schema165.description: Require the instance to validate against at least one subschema.

__schema167.title: oneOf
__schema167.description: Require the instance to validate against exactly one subschema.

__schema169.title: not
__schema169.description: Require the instance to NOT validate against the given subschema.

__schema172.title: examples
__schema172.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema179.title: externalValue
__schema179.description: A URL that points to the literal example.

__schema181.title: content
__schema181.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema183.title: MediaType
__schema183.description: Each Media Type Object provides schema and examples for the media type identified by its key.

__schema191.title: Encoding
__schema191.description: A single encoding definition applied to a single schema property.

__schema192.title: contentType
__schema192.description: The Content-Type for encoding a specific property.

__schema195.title: Header
__schema195.description: The Header Object follows the structure of the Parameter Object.

__schema196.title: Header
__schema196.description: The Header Object follows the structure of the Parameter Object.

__schema197.title: description
__schema197.description: A brief description of the parameter.

__schema198.description: Determines whether this parameter is mandatory.
__schema198.title: required

__schema200.description: Specifies that a parameter is deprecated.
__schema200.title: deprecated

__schema202.description: Sets the ability to pass empty-valued parameters.
__schema202.title: allowEmptyValue

__schema204.title: style
__schema204.description: Describes how the parameter value will be serialized.

__schema231.title: name
__schema231.description: The name of the path parameter. Must match a template expression in the path.

__schema233.title: description
__schema233.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema234.description: Path parameters must always be required.
__schema234.title: required

__schema238.title: explode
__schema238.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema241.title: examples
__schema241.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema243.title: content
__schema243.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema247.title: name
__schema247.description: The name of the header. Case-insensitive.

__schema249.title: description
__schema249.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema254.title: style
__schema254.description: Serialization style. Only 'simple' is valid for headers.

__schema255.title: explode
__schema255.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema258.title: examples
__schema258.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema260.title: content
__schema260.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema266.title: description
__schema266.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema271.title: style
__schema271.description: Serialization style. Only 'form' is valid for cookies.

__schema272.title: explode
__schema272.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema275.title: examples
__schema275.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema277.title: content
__schema277.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema290.title: responses
__schema290.description: REQUIRED. The responses for this operation.

__schema292.title: Response
__schema292.description: Describes a single response from an API Operation.

__schema293.title: Response
__schema293.description: Describes a single response from an API Operation.

__schema301.title: Link
__schema301.description: The Link object represents a possible design-time link for a response.

__schema302.title: Link
__schema302.description: The Link object represents a possible design-time link for a response.

__schema303.title: operationId
__schema303.description: The name of an existing, resolvable OAS operation, as defined with a unique operationId.

__schema304.title: operationRef
__schema304.description: A relative or absolute URI reference to an OAS operation.

__schema305.title: parameters
__schema305.description: A map representing parameters to pass to an operation as specified with operationId or identified via operationRef.

__schema308.title: requestBody
__schema308.description: A literal value or {expression} to use as a request body when calling the target operation.

__schema315.title: Callback
__schema315.description: A map of possible out-of-band callbacks related to the parent operation.

__schema316.title: Callback
__schema316.description: A map of possible out-of-band callbacks related to the parent operation.

__schema318.title: deprecated
__schema318.description: Marks this operation as deprecated. Defaults to false.

__schema320.title: security
__schema320.description: Security requirements for this operation. Overrides root-level security.

__schema322.title: SecurityRequirement
__schema322.description: Lists the required security schemes for this operation.

__schema341.title: Components
__schema341.description: Holds a set of reusable objects for different aspects of the OAS.

additionalProperties.title: SecurityScheme
additionalProperties.description: Defines a security scheme that can be used by the operations.

__schema351.title: name
__schema351.description: The name of the header, query, or cookie parameter.

__schema352.title: in
__schema352.description: Location of the API key: 'header' (most common), 'query', or 'cookie'.

__schema353.title: description
__schema353.description: A description of the security scheme.

__schema355.title: HttpSecurityScheme
__schema355.description: HTTP authentication security scheme (Basic, Bearer, etc.).

__schema358.title: bearerFormat
__schema358.description: Hint for bearer token format. Only applicable when scheme='bearer'.

__schema359.title: description
__schema359.description: A description of the security scheme.

__schema363.title: flows
__schema363.description: Allows configuration of the supported OAuth Flows.

__schema365.title: OAuthFlow
__schema365.description: Configuration details for a supported OAuth Flow.

__schema366.title: authorizationUrl
__schema366.description: The authorization URL to be used for this flow.

__schema367.title: tokenUrl
__schema367.description: The token URL to be used for this flow.

__schema368.title: refreshUrl
__schema368.description: The URL to be used for obtaining refresh tokens.

__schema369.title: scopes
__schema369.description: The available scopes for the OAuth2 security scheme.

__schema382.title: openIdConnectUrl
__schema382.description: OpenID Connect URL to discover OAuth2 configuration values.

__schema394.title: description
__schema394.description: A description for the tag. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.
